overview.short: Mohangad Fort is a ruined hill fort in Pune district, Maharashtra, India, also known as Jaslodgad.
overview.description: Mohangad Fort is a ruined hill fort in Pune district, Maharashtra, India, also known as Jaslodgad. It is located at Shirgaon, near Hirdoshi village, on the road between Bhor and Mahad. The fort was described as long deserted in a letter of 1659 from Shivaji I. The existing remains include rock-cut and dressed stone steps and several rock-cut water cisterns.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Varandha Ghat
topPlaces.description: Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.

topPlaces.name: Shivthar Ghal
topPlaces.description: Shivthar Ghal, also known as Sundarmath, (Sundarmath means Beautiful Monastery), is a cave, about 34 km from Mahad, near Barasgaon, Maharashtra, India. Shivthar Ghal is located in Varandha Ghat in the Sahyadris on the Bhor-Mahad road.

items.note: Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.

Shivthar Ghal, also known as Sundarmath, (Sundarmath means Beautiful Monastery), is a cave, about 34 km from Mahad, near Barasgaon, Maharashtra, India. Shivthar Ghal is located in Varandha Ghat in the Sahyadris on the Bhor-Mahad road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mohangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mohangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mohangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mohangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mohangad?
faq.a: Stays in Mohangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mohangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Varandha Ghat, Shivthar Ghal.
